issues_found: candidate-versus-sham 的主证据仍受 partially unmatched execution envelope 约束，机制归因还不够封口。
当前 full-scale 证据仍只覆盖 GSM8K，缺少外部 benchmark 或 cross-task validation。
proposal 中 object-line front-runner 与 final paper 中 speed-line mainline 的 story drift 仍可能让外部 reviewer 感到 narrative selection。
Feishu/Lark 同步在 registry 安全的前提下仍被本地 OAuth refresh invalid_grant 阻塞，pending queue 持续累积。
GPU telemetry 不完整：`exp/gpu_progress.json` 有 completed 列表，但 timings 为空，导致效率复盘无法量化。
issues_fixed: reviewer-facing runtime-lineage note 已从缺失变为正文与 Figure 4 的中心组成部分
artifact-release / replication statement 已补入正文
References section 与真实 Figure 1 已补齐，终审分数从 6.8 提升到 7.3
LaTeX + BibTeX + figure copy + local PDF compile 链路已跑通
当前 headline 仍容易被 reviewer 读成 broader training-free DLM revision claim，但本轮证据只足以支持 `n=100 audited slice` 的 bounded negative-case interpretation。
runtime disclosure 虽然诚实，但 reviewer 仍需要手动拼接 batch probe、executed batch、backend 和 compile 状态，缺少一个单独的 runtime-lineage artifact。
artifact checklist 已经较强，但论文仍缺少明确的 artifact-release / replication statement，导致 reproducibility story 还差最后一层 reviewer-facing 承诺。
LaTeX 和 PDF 已经跑通，但 bibliography 仍偏 minimal，appendix-style artifact inventory 仍有轻微 overfull/underfull box warning，影响 submission polish。
negative-case audit template 的科学价值已经成立，但正文还没有完全替 reviewer 把“为什么 active-control gain 被 sham-control 否定后仍值得发表”说透。
notes: {"classified_issues": [{"description": "candidate-versus-sham 的主证据仍受 partially unmatched execution envelope 约束，机制归因还不够封口。", "category": "analysis", "severity": "high", "suggestion": "下一轮若继续提升 package，优先补 stronger sham 或 routing/stopping split ablation。", "status": "recurring", "issue_key": "analysis:candidate-versus-sham-的主证据仍受-partially-unmatched-execution-envelope:ff11da7bede8"}, {"description": "当前 full-scale 证据仍只覆盖 GSM8K，缺少外部 benchmark 或 cross-task validation。", "category": "experiment", "severity": "high", "suggestion": "在保持当前 bounded framing 的前提下，优先补一个外部 benchmark 作为最小 external validation。", "status": "recurring", "issue_key": "experiment:当前-full-scale-证据仍只覆盖-gsm8k-缺少外部-benchmark-或:93a2e6940446"}, {"description": "proposal 中 object-line front-runner 与 final paper 中 speed-line mainline 的 story drift 仍可能让外部 reviewer 感到 narrative selection。", "category": "writing", "severity": "medium", "suggestion": "在最终 submission version 中再加一句更直接的 proposal-to-evidence transition sentence。", "status": "new", "issue_key": "writing:proposal-中-object-line-front-runner-与-final:0ebbda90d17c"}, {"description": "Feishu/Lark 同步在 registry 安全的前提下仍被本地 OAuth refresh invalid_grant 阻塞，pending queue 持续累积。", "category": "system", "severity": "medium", "suggestion": "下轮开始前先完成 feishu-mcp 浏览器重新授权，再恢复后台同步。", "status": "new", "requires_system_change": false, "issue_key": "system:feishu-lark-同步在-registry-安全的前提下仍被本地-oauth-refresh-invalid_grant:6f37aff2a5b8"}, {"description": "GPU telemetry 不完整：`exp/gpu_progress.json` 有 completed 列表，但 timings 为空，导致效率复盘无法量化。", "category": "efficiency", "severity": "medium", "suggestion": "为 experiment supervisor 或 dispatch 路径补全 timings / idle gap 记录；若修改 `sibyl/` 下系统代码，必须先补测试并通过后再提交。", "status": "new", "requires_system_change": true, "issue_key": "efficiency:gpu-telemetry-不完整-exp-gpu_progress-json-有-completed:1bac77fe401a"}], "quality_trajectory": "improving"}
